primary_sources.source_name: DPE Annual Survey of Central Public Sector Enterprises 2022-23
primary_sources.notes: Department of Public Enterprises survey covers 384 CPSEs. Aggregate financials: employee costs, establishment charges, profitability by sector. FY2022-23 data (most recent DPE publication).

primary_sources.source_name: Coal India Limited FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 533278)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹150,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹30,000 Cr (20%), Stores & spares ~₹12,000 Cr (8%).
Revenue ~₹24,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹7,000 Cr (29.2%), Material ~₹12,000 Cr (50%).
Revenue ~₹30,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹7,000 Cr (23.3%), Manufacturing expenses ~40%.

primary_sources.source_name: CAG (Comptroller and Auditor General of India) Reports on PSUs 2023-24
primary_sources.notes: CAG performance audit reports cite specific cost benchmarks and wastage/inefficiency metrics for CPSEs.

source_metadata.methodology: P25/P50/P75 derived from DPE CPSE survey aggregate data + FY24-25 annual reports of 3 representative CPSEs (CIL, BHEL, HAL). DPE notes 'Miniratna' and 'Navratna' CPSEs as best-in-class; 'loss-making' CPSEs at P90. Categories as % of revenue.

HR.source_note: Employee costs % of revenue. HAL FY25: 23.3%, CIL FY25: 20%, BHEL FY25: 29.2%. DPE CPSE Survey: manufacturing CPSEs 20-35%, financial CPSEs 10-15%, service CPSEs 30-45%. P90 represents loss-making or infrastructure CPSEs.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Stores, spares, contract services, raw material. CIL FY25: stores & spares ~8%, contract expenses ~12%. BHEL: materials ~50%. DPE: aggregate cost-of-goods including outsourced services.

PLANT_MAINTENANCE.source_note: R&M and maintenance costs. CIL FY25: R&M ~3.5% of revenue. DPE survey: maintenance costs elevated in ageing PSU infrastructure. CAG performance audits frequently cite deferred maintenance as issue.

IT.source_note: IT spend. CPSEs typically underinvest in IT relative to private sector. MCA21 and e-procurement mandates driving IT investments. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

FACILITIES.source_note: Establishment charges including township, canteen, schools. DPE CPSE Survey: township and establishment charges significant for manufacturing CPSEs with captive residential colonies.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Legal, CAG audit, Ministry consultations. CAG statutory audit is mandated; CPSEs also subject to supplementary audit. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

BRSR_ESG.source_note: CSR mandatory spend (2% of PAT) + ESG reporting costs. CIL FY25: CSR ₹1,800 Cr (1.2% of revenue). Navratna CPSEs: higher CSR absolute spend. BRSR mandated by SEBI for listed PSUs.

INSURANCE.source_note: INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — CPSEs often self-insure large assets via New India Assurance (public sector insurer) at subsidised rates.
